title: TokenOps
description: Open-source operational intelligence layer for AI systems. Real-time token optimization, inference observability, agent usage analytics, prompt intelligence, forecasting, governance, AI efficiency coaching across OpenAI Anthropic Gemini. Sits between clients/agents/workflows and frontier LLM providers.

features.title: TokenOps Proxy
features.description: Local proxy intercepting requests between clients and LLM providers. Foundation for all other components.

features.title: Optimization Engine
features.description: Reduces token waste in real time via compression deduplication retrieval pruning context trimming adaptive routing.

features.title: Observability Platform
features.description: Token analytics spend tracking workflow attribution latency tracking efficiency scoring.

features.title: Coaching Engine
features.description: Replays expensive sessions generates optimized alternatives teaches prompt efficiency. Local models async batch analysis.

features.title: Forecasting and Governance
features.description: Weekly limit tracking budget alerts usage forecasting anomaly detection.

features.title: Client Integrations
features.description: First-party integrations across CLI ecosystem IDEs SDK ecosystem.

features.title: TokenOps CLI
features.description: Command-line interface for daemon management replay optimization analysis status coaching.

features.title: Dashboard
features.description: Vue web dashboard for live token usage spend attribution forecasts agent analytics optimization opportunities.

features.title: Data Model and Telemetry
features.description: Event schema for prompts workflows optimizations coaching. Local-first with optional cloud emission. OpenTelemetry compatible.

features.title: Security and Privacy
features.description: Local-first self-hostable privacy-preserving. Opt-in cloud telemetry. Air-gapped deployment supported.
